post.subject: update
post.body: Still workin on my website. Truckin along nicely. Last 5 visitors were from Amsterdam, Noord-holland Stockholm, Singapore, Tampere, Etela-suomen Laani and Tokyo. Nice. Also working on normal blog A blog or weblog (derived from web + log) is a web-based publication consisting primarily of periodic articles (normally, but not always, in reverse chronological order). Everyday making small changes and getting there one step at a time. Keeps me sane really. In other news. I gotta go to bed cos im working in the morning.
